shortDescription: Renovated 4-bedroom semi-detached in Kensington with open-concept layout and finished lower level.
fullDescription: Welcome to 43 Bellevue Avenue in the vibrant Kensington neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The 4 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Minutes to parks, shops, and restaurants
Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
